name: Apple EarPods (USB-C / Lightning)
description: Apple’s official wired earphones with a comfortable open-fit design. Offers clear vocals, balanced sound, and seamless compatibility with iPhones and USB-C devices. Includes in-line controls for calls and music.

name: Samsung AKG Type-C Earphones
description: AKG-tuned Samsung earphones delivering rich bass and clear highs. Designed for modern phones without headphone jacks, offering premium sound at an affordable price.

name: Sony MDR-EX15AP
description: Reliable Sony wired earphones with powerful bass and comfortable silicone tips. Ideal for everyday music listening with good sound isolation.

name: JBL Tune 110
description: JBL wired earphones with signature Pure Bass sound. Durable flat cable design prevents tangling and ensures long-lasting use.

name: Oraimo Type-C Wired Earphones
description: Affordable wired earphones popular in Kenya, offering strong bass and reliable performance for everyday use.

name: Infinix XE10 Wired Earphones
description: Entry-level wired earphones with decent sound quality and a comfortable fit. Ideal for calls, classes, and casual listening.

name: Xiaomi Mi In-Ear Basic
description: Minimalist earphones with aluminum build and clean sound profile. Offers good durability and balanced audio for the price.

name: Huawei CM33 USB-C Earphones
description: USB-C digital earphones with clear sound output and stable connectivity. Ideal for newer Android phones without headphone jacks.
